basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NITC), Office of Research and Consultancy
basic_details.application_mode: Email (soft copy of application + CV + documents)
basic_details.short_information: NIT Calicut is recruiting 1 Project Associate-I post under ANRF project in Mechanical Engineering Department. Eligible candidates with Master's/Bachelor's in Mechanical Engineering can apply. Last date: 31 July 2026.

application_fee.details: There is No Application Fee for this recruitment.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: As per ANRF / Institute norms (relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwD as per GoI rules) | other requirements: Candidates already employed must submit NOC from current employer at the time of interview
qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with minimum 6.0 CGPA / 60% marks OR Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with minimum 6.0 CGPA / 60% marks

vacancy_details.details: A total of 1 Project Associate-I position is announced under the ANRF-funded project. The role involves development of high-fidelity multiphase-electrochemistry solver, code development in C++/Python, and research related to bubble-driven degradation in electrochemical cells. The position is temporary and project-specific.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹37,000 + 20% HRA for candidates qualified through CSIR-UGC NET/GATE ₹30,000 + 20% HRA for others

selection_process: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Online Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents and performance in the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates must submit the application through email only. Follow these steps:
Fill the prescribed application form (annexed in notification).
Prepare a single PDF containing: Duly filled application form, latest CV, soft copies of all mark sheets/certificates, and proof of experience (if any).
Email the PDF to [email protected] with a copy to [email protected].
Applicants are responsible for the authenticity of all submitted documents.
important_instructions: This is a purely contractual/temporary position. No claim for regular appointment at NITC. Selected candidate must join immediately after selection. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Calicut is recruiting 1 Project Associate-I post under ANRF project in Mechanical Engineering Department. Eligible candidates with Master's/Bachelor's in Mechanical Engineering can apply. Last date: 31 July 2026.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_calicut: High-Fidelity Multiphase-Electrochemistry Solver for Predicting Bubble-Driven Degradation in Electrochemical Cells
1 Year (extendable based on performance and project fund availability)

Email (soft copy of application + CV + documents)

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 1 Project Associate-I position is announced under the ANRF-funded project. The role involves development of high-fidelity multiphase-electrochemistry solver, code development in C++/Python, and research related to bubble-driven degradation in electrochemical cells. The position is temporary and project-specific.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with minimum 6.0 CGPA / 60% marks OR Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with minimum 6.0 CGPA / 60% marks
Experience in code development using C++ / Python
As per ANRF / Institute norms (relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwD as per GoI rules)
Candidates already employed must submit NOC from current employer at the time of interview

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: There is No Application Fee for this recruitment.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Online Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must submit the application through email only. Follow these steps: Fill the prescribed application form (annexed in notification). Prepare a single PDF containing: Duly filled application form, latest CV, soft copies of all mark sheets/certificates, and proof of experience (if any). Email the PDF to [email protected] with a copy to [email protected] . Use subject line: "Application for JRF/ANRF/ECRG/2025/005345/ENS". Applicants are responsible for the authenticity of all submitted documents.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Candidates
content_sections.text: This is a purely contractual/temporary position. No claim for regular appointment at NITC. Selected candidate must join immediately after selection. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 31 July 2026 (11:59 PM). Candidates must email the complete application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive ₹37,000 + 20% HRA if qualified through GATE/NET, or ₹30,000 + 20% HRA for others.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: Essential qualification is Master's or Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering with minimum 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA. Experience in C++/Python code development is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for NIT Calicut ANRF Project 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the application form, attach CV and documents in a single PDF, and email to [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NIT Calicut Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this position.

faq.question: Q6. When is the online interview for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: The online interview is scheduled on 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the project title for this NIT Calicut vacancy?
faq.answer: "High-Fidelity Multiphase-Electrochemistry Solver for Predicting Bubble-Driven Degradation in Electrochemical Cells".

faq.question: Q8. Can final year students apply for Project Associate-I at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: No, candidates must have completed the required degree by the time of application.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: No, it is a 1-year contractual position (extendable) under a sponsored research project. It is not a regular faculty or staff position.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for NIT Calicut Project Associate application?
faq.answer: Duly filled application form, CV, all academic mark sheets/certificates, experience certificates (if any), and NOC (for employed candidates).
